creator: i.dani@outlook.com
text:
There is an update available for PDFLib, which is available since february 2019. The current version is extremly outdated.

Current Version: 7.0.5
New Supported Version: 9.2.0

Can be downloaded here: https://www.pdflib.com/download/pdflib-product-family/

Changelog for version 9: https://www.pdflib.com/fileadmin/pdflib/changelog/changes-PDFlib-9.2.0.txt

Thanks for taking a look at it.
